examples: One saw, even before the 100th anniversary of the death of Queen Victoria this year, that there were signs these sneering attitudes were beginning to change.
Running out very far I could still hear them sneering.
Running out very far, I could still hear them sneering .
The authors, all supporters of the green movement, were strong on contempt and sneering, but weak on substance.
There is of course a certain amount of Anglo-type sneering at the size and layout of the house.
